goalbuddy_receipt_v1.rationale: 137件の回帰で二者別thread、文章禁止schema、consensus後commit、span再現、新規派生key、旧ID・旧正答・旧解説除去、hold非commitを確認した。実モデル全件trial前に、対象判定へ元選択肢も渡し、targetの計算フラグを通常候補から必須取得する小修正が必要。

worker_package.objective: aggregate review入力へsourceのchoiceTextListを読み取り専用で追加し、question_type全問題で必ず二重レビューを実行する。targetでは通常candidateのisCalculationQuestion booleanを保持・必須化し、一律falseを廃止する。
stop_if: Review output schema would gain a text field.
Target could commit without a boolean isCalculationQuestion.
Verification fails twice for the same unresolved reason.

evidence: 137 focused tests passed in PM verification.
No 00_source path appears in git diff.
Two aggregate review work types end in _candidate and therefore use read-only ephemeral Codex threads.
Formal derived choices and sourceUniqueKeys are recomputed from source spans before commit.
missing_evidence: Real gpt-5.5 high smoke and 1044-question run have not yet executed.
Downstream correctness, explanation, delivery, publish, and readback remain.
required_board_updates: Activate T008, then run a small live smoke before the full refresh.
